fields.name: Mortal
fields.title: Mortal
fields.intro_text: You are but flesh and bone.

fields.name: Body Tempering
fields.title: Cultivator
fields.intro_text: Your body begins to absorb qi.

fields.name: Qi Condensation
fields.title: Qi Adept
fields.intro_text: Qi flows freely through your meridians.

fields.name: Core Formation
fields.title: Core Elder
fields.intro_text: The golden core pulses with power.

fields.name: Nascent Soul
fields.title: Nascent Soul Master
fields.intro_text: Your soul ascends beyond the mortal coil.
